visual_intent: negative space for short Japanese copy
brand_guardrails: keep it minimal, intelligent, and premium
preserve accurate bottle silhouette, white cap, and label fidelity
avoid cluttered props or hard-sell composition
match mood, palette, light quality, whitespace, and restraint from the selected references without duplicating exact crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
composition: product occupies roughly one third of the frame
ample negative space for one short Japanese headline and one secondary line
cloud-white to mist-blue environment with restrained apricot glow
clean premium surface and soft backlight
reference_strategy: Use product-glow as the dominant lighting anchor, editorial-whitespace to preserve premium breathing room, and the approved bottle source only for pack fidelity.
variation_guardrails: do not center the bottle exactly like the earlier draft
keep the glow subtle and premium rather than ad-like
vary crop and angle while preserving clean label readability
leave more text-safe room than a typical product ad

slides_ja: サブラインのプレースホルダー

notes: Template Set 3 reference asset. Refine the product-led look into a reusable premium Mitozz composition that feels editorial rather than promotional.
